# Platform Experiment Playbook

Use native platform tests where available.

## Google Ads

Google Ads API supports experiment campaigns to A/B test changes to campaign structure, bidding, and other settings. Google Ads also has an Experiments page for ad variations, custom experiments, video experiments, and Performance Max experiments.

## Meta

Meta Conversion Lift compares conversions between a test group and a holdout/control group to estimate incremental impact.

## TikTok

TikTok Split Testing can test variables such as targeting, placement, bidding/optimization, and creative while splitting audiences to isolate the tested variable.

## LinkedIn

LinkedIn Conversion Lift Testing measures incremental conversions using Insight Tag or Conversions API data. LinkedIn Brand Lift Testing measures brand metrics such as recall, familiarity, favorability, and consideration.

If the campaign has enough volume and the platform supports a test, prefer native experiment/lift tooling over informal before/after comparison.
